description: S30/H5 friend remark/alias (coverage-widening, hermetic): drive l3_set_friend_remark on the seeded echo-peer friend and prove a set/clear round-trips through l3_dump_state.friends[].remark. Sets a unique-nonce remark, asserts it appears in the friends list, clears it, asserts it's gone (state_not_contains). The remark is account-scoped Prefs (Prefs.setFriendRemark), distinct from the Tox nickName. Self-cleans (ends with the remark cleared) even if interrupted. Hermetic — no echo round-trip; the remark is local Prefs state. Maps to feature H5 / S30.
